tokens.text: is ammunition for a shooter item

fields.title: Search Inventory
fields.description: Can search inventory? Default is set to false.

fields.title: Use In Creative
fields.description: Can use in creative mode? Default is set to false.

fields.title: Use Offhand
fields.description: Can use off-hand? Default is set to false.

description: Configures this item as ammunition consumed by ranged weapons like bows and crossbows. Reference compatible shooter items and specify search behavior for inventory slots. When players use the associated weapon, this item is consumed and its projectile is launched.
title: Item Ammunition
